---
name: video2pr
description: Processes meeting video recordings into transcripts, structured summaries, and codebase-grounded implementation plans. Use when given a video file of a meeting.
tools: all
---

Use the video2pr skill defined in `.github/skills/video2pr/SKILL.md` to process the provided video file. Follow the skill's phased workflow to extract audio, transcribe, analyze the codebase, and produce an implementation plan.
